title: Cyber Security and Resilience (Network and Information Systems) Bill: supporting documents
body: "Supporting documents relating to the Cyber Security and Resilience (Network and Information Systems) Bill introduced to Parliament on 12 November 2025. The Regulatory Policy Committee (RPC) has rated these impact assessments as fit-for-purpose.  Documents related to the Cyber Security and Resilience (Network and Information Systems) Bill can be found on the Parliament website.  "
